neighborhoods.name: Downtown Raleigh
neighborhoods.description: Urban luxury living steps from award-winning dining, the Warehouse District, and Red Hat Amphitheater.

highlights.highlight: Walk Score 88 · Vibrant nightlife & arts scene
New luxury high-rise and loft conversions
5-min access to Glenwood South & Moore Square

neighborhoods.name: North Hills
neighborhoods.description: Raleigh's premier mixed-use enclave — designer boutiques, fine dining, and estate-caliber residences.

neighborhoods.name: Cary
neighborhoods.description: Family-forward sophistication with master-planned communities, top schools, and RTP commuter convenience.

neighborhoods.name: Wake Forest
neighborhoods.description: Expansive acreage, equestrian properties, and new-construction luxury in one of the Triangle's fastest-growing corridors.

highlights.highlight: Historic downtown charm meets new growth
